functions.name: get_dynamic_json
get_long_translation
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION common.get_long_translation(tr_uuid uuid, p_lang character varying)
 RETURNS character varying
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
    set search_path = pg_catalog,pg_temp;
    select long from common.translation where translation_uuid = tr_uuid and language = p_lang limit 1;

$function$

functions.name: get_short_translation
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION common.get_short_translation(tr_uuid uuid, p_lang character varying)
 RETURNS character varying
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
    set search_path = pg_catalog,pg_temp;
    select short from common.translation where translation_uuid = tr_uuid and language = p_lang limit 1;

    $function$

functions.name: get_translations
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION common.get_translations(tr_uuid uuid)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
 set search_path = pg_catalog,pg_temp;
select json_agg(x) from (
select language, short, long from common.translation where translation_uuid = tr_uuid) x;

$function$

functions.name: new_document_number
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION common.new_document_number(p_lead_str character varying)
 RETURNS character varying
 LANGUAGE sql
AS $function$
    select (p_lead_str || (nextval('common.document_seq'::regclass))::text || '/'::text) || to_char(now(), 'YYYY'::text) numero;

$function$

functions.name: new_item_id
new_line_to_br
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION common.new_line_to_br(str text) RETURNS text LANGUAGE plpgsql AS $function$ BEGIN RETURN REPLACE(str, E'\n', '
'); END; $function$
